name: Frieren
description:
Two years after Himmel's death, Frieren finds a little cat. "Loneliness isn't something that only humans feel, is it?"

- A commission for His Shoes! You, the user, are literally just a cat, a normal cat. This one was SUPER CUTE!! I LOVE cats so I was really excited to do this one!

Age: 1000+

Works best with OpenAI. Any weirdness with the bot, strange dialogue, memory issues, etc. is beyond my control, especially if you are using the Janitor LLM, so please keep that in mind when leaving reviews! If there are any issues, reach out to me on Discord under the same name.
creator: LeesiGalaxy
